Name: Moze
Desc: A Shadow Guard of the Yaoqing. He is reticent and silent, always acting on his own.\nAs an expert in intelligence services and other affairs that must remain obscure, Moze rarely shows himself before others. The moment he shows his true capacities is usually the moment for his enemies to face death.\nHe has a wealth of knowledge regarding methods of assassination and seems to have an extraordinary obsession with tidiness and cleanliness.

1.Name: Oathkeeper
1.Desc: When this character deals DMG with his Ultimate, it is considered as having launched a follow-up attack. Increases follow-up attack DMG taken by the enemy marked as Prey by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

2.Name: Wrathbearer
2.Desc: After entering battle, Moze regenerates <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> point(s) of Energy. For every time the Additional DMG from his Talent is triggered, Moze regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> point(s) of Energy.

3.Name: Deathchaser
3.Desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>. Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.Name: Heathprowler
4.Desc: The CRIT DMG boost effect of the Vengewise additionally increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

5.Name: Truthbender
5.Desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>. Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.Name: Faithbinder
6.Desc: After using the Ultimate to attack an enemy target, Moze immediately launches the follow-up attack from Talent against this target. If the target is defeated before this follow-up attack is used, then activate the follow-up attack against a random single enemy.

122301.Name: Hurlthorn
122301.Desc: Deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Moze's ATK to a single enemy.

122302.Name: Fleetwinged Raid
122302.Desc: Marks a designated single enemy target as the Prey and deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Moze's ATK to it.\nWhen there are no other characters on the field that are capable of combat, Moze cannot use his Skill and dispels the enemy's Prey state.

122303.Name: <unbreak>Dash In,</unbreak> <unbreak>Gash Out</unbreak>
122303.Desc: Increases the DMG dealt by this character by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color>, lasting for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s), and deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Moze's ATK to a single target enemy.

122304.Name: Cascading Featherblade
122304.Desc: Moze will enter the <u>Departed</u> state while a Prey exists on the field.\nAfter allies attack the Prey, Moze will additionally deal 1 instance of <u>Additional Lightning DMG</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of his ATK and gains 1 Charge. When Moze's Charge reaches <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> points, consume all Charges to launch 1 <u>follow-up attack</u> to the Prey, dealing Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Moze's ATK and dispel the target's Prey state.

122306.Name: Attack
122306.Desc: Attacks an enemy, and when the battle starts, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

122307.Name: Bated Wings
122307.Desc: After using his Technique, Moze gains Stealth for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> second(s). While Stealth is active, Moze cannot be detected by enemies. Action Advances by <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> and increases the DMG Moze deals by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> when he enters combat by attacking enemies while in Stealth mode, lasting for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

1.PointDesc: Recover <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Skill Point(s) after using a follow-up attack. This effect can be triggered again after <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

Moze's Action is Advanced Forward by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> when his Departed status is dispelled. If Moze's current Charge equals <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> or greater, then his action will instead be Advanced Forward by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>.
When an ally attacks an enemy marked as Prey, increases the CRIT DMG dealt by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.
